parameters.subject: =⚠️ n8n failure: {{ $json.workflow.name }} — {{ $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted }}

parameters.content:
## Catch-all error handler
Fires when ANY workflow that names this as its Error Workflow throws an unhandled error. Emails the failure (workflow, failed node, message, execution link) to joe.lemieux@n8n.io.

**Assign it (UI only):** in each outreach workflow → Settings → Error Workflow → select this. Or set it as the instance default.
